toggle.descTempDisabled: Temporarily stopped; will resume after restarting the app
toggle.descNormal: Lets enabled sync directions run in the background and guides you through required permissions

main.footer: Background download and upload follow the Auto-write and Auto-push direction settings

notification.title: Persistent service notification
notification.desc: Keeping it on improves background service stability

battery.title: Ignore battery optimization
battery.desc: Prevents battery saver from interrupting background sync

download.title: Download from remote
download.desc: Receive new remote content in the background when Auto-write is on

upload.title: Upload local clipboard
upload.desc: Upload background clipboard changes when Auto-push is on

description.overlay-polling: Recommended for most people; no computer needed, but it may briefly affect input
description.overlay-event: Reads only after copies; less interference, but a computer is needed once
description.shizuku: The most seamless option; requires Shizuku to stay running

issueDescription.service-unavailable: Install and start Shizuku, then return to authorize
issueDescription.permission-required: Follow the system prompt to allow UniClip to use this method
issueDescription.system-restriction: Use Shizuku to turn off the MIUI smart clipboard restriction
issueDescription.monitoring-setup-required: Run one ADB command on a computer with USB debugging enabled

setup.commandCopied: Command copied; run it in a computer terminal
setup.failed: Background clipboard setup could not be completed

sheet.title: Choose a background reading method
sheet.subtitle: Swipe to compare setup effort, responsiveness, and limitations

overlay-polling.title: Timed polling
overlay-polling.summary: The simplest option, with no computer or extra app required
overlay-polling.bestFor: Most people who want it to work with minimal setup
overlay-polling.benefit: No ADB; works as soon as overlay permission is granted
overlay-polling.tradeoff: Checks every second and may briefly affect keyboards, games, or full-screen apps
overlay-polling.setup: Allow UniClip to display over other apps

overlay-event.title: ADB events
overlay-event.summary: Reads only after a copy for faster response and less daily interference
overlay-event.bestFor: People who can connect a computer and prefer lower power use
overlay-event.benefit: No continuous polling; runs only when Android reports a copy event
overlay-event.tradeoff: Authorization must be repeated after reinstalling the app
overlay-event.setup: Requires overlay permission, USB debugging, and ADB on a computer

shizuku.title: Shizuku
shizuku.summary: The smoothest background monitoring without an overlay
shizuku.bestFor: Advanced users who already use or understand Shizuku
shizuku.benefit: Event-driven, responsive, and never temporarily takes window focus
shizuku.tradeoff: Depends on the Shizuku service, which usually needs restarting after a reboot
shizuku.setup: Install and start Shizuku, then grant UniClip access

adbGuide.title: Authorize ADB event detection
adbGuide.subtitle: UniClip uses this permission only to detect copy events and does not process other log content

status.copied: Command copied. Run it in a computer terminal, then return to check access.
status.notDetected: Authorization was not detected. Check the device connection and command result.

adbGuide.step1: Install Android Platform Tools (ADB) on the computer.
adbGuide.step2: Enable USB debugging in the phone's Developer options.
adbGuide.step3: Connect by USB and allow debugging from this computer on the phone.
adbGuide.step4: Run the command below in the computer terminal, then tap Check access.

restriction.title: Turn off the MIUI clipboard restriction
restriction.text: UniClip will use Shizuku to turn off MIUI's smart clipboard restriction so clipboard content can be read and written in the background. This may also disable the system smart clipboard feature.

enableAutoSync.title: Enable background auto-sync
enableAutoSync.text: Once enabled, the app keeps syncing the clipboard in the background. We'll guide you through battery, notification, and clipboard access for the selected method. Allowing all of them gives the best result, but declining still lets you keep using the app.

disableNotification.title: Turn off persistent notification
disableNotification.text: Turning off the persistent notification reduces background service stability and makes it more likely the system will terminate background tasks.

missingNotificationPermission.title: Notification permission missing
missingNotificationPermission.text: Notification permission hasn't been granted, so the persistent notification may not appear. We recommend allowing notifications in system settings.

enableUpload.title: Enable background upload of local clipboard
enableUpload.text:
You don't need to enable this option — UniClip also lets you upload text directly from the menu that pops up when you select text.

On Android 10 and above, apps can't directly read the local clipboard in the background. You may need to enable the overlay or use another tool to work around this limitation.

batteryFallback.title: Can't open system dialog
batteryFallback.text: The system only allows the battery optimization request to appear once per installation. Please turn off battery optimization manually in system settings.
